versions.version_description: Need that A in the main riff and the D variations in the bridge.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Begin the strumming pattern with a strum ahead of the beat, on the & of 4.


[Intro]

[ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
       

[Verse]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]     
There's every good reason [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
For letting you go[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
She's sneaky and smoked out[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
And it's starting to show[/tab]

[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
I never let you go[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
I never let you go[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
I never let you go[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]         
I never let you [/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
Turn around, our back on each other[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
That's a good idea, break a promise to your mother[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
Turn around your back on each other[/tab]


[Instrumental]

[ch]D[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]


[Verse] 

[tab][ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]     
You say that I've changed[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]     
Well maybe I did[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]     
But even if I changed[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]     
What's wrong with it[/tab]

[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
I never let you go[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
I never let you go[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
I never let you go[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]         
I never let you [/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
Turn around, our back on each other[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
That's a good idea, break a promise to your mother[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
Turn around your back on each other[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
And our friends are gone and gone[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
And all the time moves on and on[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
And all I know is it's wrong, it's wrong[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
And all I know it's wrong, it's wrong, [/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
It's wrong, it's wrong[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
If there's a reason, it's lost on me [/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
Maybe we'll be friends, I guess we'll see[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
I never let you go[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
I never let you go[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
I never let you go[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]         
I never let you [/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
Turn around, our back on each other[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
That's a good idea, break a promise to your mother[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
Turn around your back on each other[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
Good idea, break a promise to your mother[/tab]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
Turn around, our back on each other[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
That's a good idea, break a promise to your mother[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
Turn around your back on each other[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
What a good idea...[/tab]


[Outro]

[tab]               [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]         
I remember the stupid things, the mood rings, [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
The bracelets and the beads[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]  
Nickels and dimes, yours and mine, [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
Did you cash in all your dreams[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]      
You don't dream for me, no (goodbye, goodbye) [/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
You don't dream for me, no[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
But I still feel you pulse like sonar [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
From the days in the waves[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
That girl is like a sunburn[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
I would like to say[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
The girl is like a sunburn[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
I would like to say[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
She's like a sunburn[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
She's like a sunburn[/tab]
